art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 is officially underway (March 27-29). New initiatives include the 'Echoes' sector and 'Zero 10' digital art debut.
top_stories: Art Basel HK 2026 at HKCEC features 240 galleries; strong early sales reported.
New curation platforms 'Echoes' and digital art section 'Zero 10' debut in Asia.
Notable transactions include a Picasso painting ($4M) and strong sales for Korean artists Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin.
5-year collaboration agreement between Hong Kong Culture Bureau and Art Basel announced.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,438.98 (-0.40%) after recovering from an earlier 3% plunge.
key_factors: TurboQuant tech impact: Major semiconductor stocks continue to face downward pressure for second consecutive day.
Market resilience: KOSPI recovered significantly from intraday lows (approx. 5,200 level).
Investor activity: Strong net purchases by individual and institutional investors partially offset heavy foreign selling.
Geopolitical/Macro: Rising oil prices due to Iran war concerns remain a key market anxiety.
